use tokio::sync::Semaphore;

async fn fetch_with_limit(sem: &Semaphore, url: &str) -> Result<String, reqwest::Error> {
    let permit = sem.acquire().await.unwrap();
    let body = reqwest::get(url).await?.text().await?;
    drop(permit);
    Ok(body)
}

async fn process_items(sem: &Semaphore, items: Vec<String>) {
    for item in items {
        let permit = sem.acquire().await.unwrap();
        let result = expensive_computation(&item).await;
        save_result(&result).await;
        drop(permit);
    }
}

async fn expensive_computation(_input: &str) -> String { todo!() }
async fn save_result(_result: &str) { todo!() }
